root: ^NOUR: This is a place I'd usually go to get snacks with my mom. I never really got to try junk food, so I'd get the pretzel bites.
^NOUR: I wish I could've tried the cinnamon sugar bites...

dreamvisited: ^NOUR: This looks more like the place I'd usually go to get snacks with my mom.
^NOUR: If only that weird guy let me try the cinnamon sugar bites...
